required_fields.label: Ordering provider
required_fields.reason: A named ordering clinician is required before the case can be handed off.

required_fields.label: Location of service
required_fields.reason: The site of care must be known for the authorization packet.

required_fields.label: Payer
required_fields.reason: The case must identify the target health plan.

required_fields.label: Diagnosis or supporting indication
required_fields.reason: The packet needs a diagnosis or supporting indication on file.

required_fields.label: Clinical notes flag
required_fields.reason: Clinical notes are required to support medical necessity documentation.

required_fields.label: Imaging order flag
required_fields.reason: The imaging order must be documented before submission.

required_documents.label: Clinical notes attachment
required_documents.reason: The payer packet needs uploadable clinical notes.

required_documents.label: Imaging order attachment
required_documents.reason: The imaging order should be attached to the request packet.

conditional_requirements.label: Conservative therapy documented
conditional_requirements.reason: Non-urgent lumbar MRI requests usually need documentation of attempted conservative therapy.

escalation_conditions.reason: Urgent MRI requests should be routed to a human coordinator before submission.
Pediatric advanced imaging cases are configured for manual handling in this prototype.

OUTPATIENT_PT_AUTH.service_requested: Outpatient physical therapy evaluation and treatment

required_fields.label: Ordering provider
required_fields.reason: The therapy request needs a named ordering clinician.

required_fields.label: Location of service
required_fields.reason: The rehabilitation site must be listed before handoff.

required_fields.label: Payer
required_fields.reason: The health plan must be identified before the case is routed.

required_fields.label: Diagnosis or supporting indication
required_fields.reason: The request needs a diagnosis or indication for authorization review.

required_fields.label: Clinical notes flag
required_fields.reason: A therapy request should include supporting evaluation notes.

required_documents.label: PT referral attachment
required_documents.reason: The referring order should be attached before the packet is complete.

required_documents.label: Supporting clinical notes attachment
required_documents.reason: Supporting notes are needed to describe functional need and prior care.

required_fields.label: Ordering provider
required_fields.reason: A named ordering clinician is required before handoff.

required_fields.label: Location of service
required_fields.reason: The site of care must be identified for authorization routing.

required_fields.label: Payer
